body.query: mutation verificationCodeRequest($params: VerificationCodeInput!) { verificationCodeRequest(params: $params) { delay success __typename } }
mutation sendCode($sendCodeInput: SendCodeInput!) { sendCode(input: $sendCodeInput) { status errors { code subject systemMessage userMessage params __typename } __typename } }
